news.title: OpenAI updates its Agents SDK to help enterprises build safer, more capable agents
news.summary: OpenAI has expanded the capabilities of its agent-building toolkit, as agentic AI continues to grow in popularity.

news.title: Hightouch reaches $100M ARR fueled by marketing tools powered by AI
news.summary: The startup says it grew its ARR by $70 million in just 20 months after launching an AI agent platform for marketers.

news.title: LinkedIn data shows AI isn’t to blame for hiring decline… yet
news.summary: LinkedIn says hiring is down 20% since 2022, but blames higher interest rates — not AI — for the slowdown.

news.title: AI learning app Gizmo levels up with 13M users and a $22M investment
news.summary: Gizmo, an AI-powered learning platform, has attracted more than 13 million users and just secured $22 million in Series A funding.

news.title: Can AI judge journalism? A Thiel-backed startup says yes, even if it risks chilling whistleblowers
news.summary: Objection, a Thiel-backed startup, aims to use AI to judge journalism, letting users pay to challenge stories. Critics warn it could chill whistleblowers and reshape how media accountability works.

news.title: Google rolls out a native Gemini app for Mac
news.summary: You can share anything on their screen with Gemini to get help with what they're looking at in the moment, including local files.
